Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Cody Purtell at HK52.

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Mike Papequash vs. Rodney Dela Rosa; Kris Pomerleau vs. Robin Combs; Phil Towler vs. Ryan Shanahan; Derek Daku vs. Devon Smith.

Video.title: Fight Vault - HK24 - Episode 3

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK24 - Episode 3

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Wade Baldwin vs. Damon Steadman; Ryan Starkell vs. Travis Triskle; Chris Wilson vs. Ron Gonzales; Matt Zemlak vs. David Swanson.
